topShowsByWatchCount.description: A disguised billionaire protects his son, destroys arrogant enemies, and helps a betrayed entrepreneur reclaim her power.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Project MEERA
topShowsByWatchCount.description: Neglected by her family, Meera enters a thirty-year sleep experiment, leaving them to face devastating regret.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Ek Raat Do Baarat
topShowsByWatchCount.description: After one dangerous night, runaway Siya’s pregnancy forces soldier Veer into a duty-bound marriage that slowly becomes love.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Bewafa Kaun?
topShowsByWatchCount.description: After signing divorce papers, Priya rebuilds her life while arrogant CEO Rohit realizes his love too late.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Servant of Desire
topShowsByWatchCount.description: Emma, desperate to pay her brother's hospital bills, is drawn into the orbit of Ethan. By chance, she becomes the Walker family's maid. As fate turns, the eldest son Ethan shows ambiguous affection toward her and wants her as his personal maid, while the second son also confesses his love.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Tum Tak
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A mysterious girl’s hidden past, love, betrayal, and a life-saving secret that changes everyone’s destiny forever.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Secret Shaadi
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A poor girl marries a cold CEO for her father’s treatment, hiding identity as love slowly blossoms.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Pyaar ya Vyapaar ?
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A forced marriage turns into unexpected love as hidden pasts, secrets, and rival lovers threaten their fragile relationship.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Boss Baby
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A mystical immortal reborn as a baby protects his parents, battling dark forces, power struggles, and destiny.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Gumshuda
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A jealous husband, missing wife, and hidden crime unravel dark secrets, obsession, and deadly truth.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Mr. X
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A beggar with hidden divine healing powers saves a billionaire’s dying daughter, exposing his true identity and destiny.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Banquet of Revenge
topShowsByWatchCount.description: Mason Miller, a Level 8 warrior, honors a marriage pact but faces the Walker family's scorn. They force the critically ill Sophia Walker to wed him instead of the favored Charlotte Walker. Humiliated at the banquet, Mason unleashes his power, shocking all. He protects Sophia and crushes his mockers.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Mystic Bond
topShowsByWatchCount.description: Harper Lee awakens Piercing Eye by accident. His master reveals his arranged fiancée holds a matching jade for sainthood. Saving her from danger, she calls him a pervert. He smirks, "Let me prove my abilities to you!" Watch how he navigates the city!

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Unspoken Desire
topShowsByWatchCount.description:
"Emily regrets the one-night stand with the man she had secretly loved for eight years, letting him pay her.
Michael is intimate at night, a stranger by day. When it's time to arrange a marriage, he takes her home instead.
After family drama and an injury, he sends her away but keeps saving her."

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Secret Surgeon
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A genius surgeon disguises himself as a hospital cleaner to expose corruption and save lives with extraordinary medical skill.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Pyaar Ka X-Ray
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A struggling taxi driver gains mysterious x-ray vision powers, entering a dangerous world of antiques, secrets, curses, and destiny.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Yamlok Express
topShowsByWatchCount.description: Poor Ronak dies accidentally, bribes Yamlok, returns alive rich, exposes betrayal, fights destiny and love.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Biwi ka Hatyara
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A heartbroken cop investigates brutal murder, unaware victim is his pregnant wife’s ghost.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Dangerous Vijay
topShowsByWatchCount.description: A wronged man gains mystical power to destroy corrupt elites and reclaim justice, family, and honor.

topShowsByWatchCount.name: Moving Ahead
topShowsByWatchCount.description: After being dumped as a “clingy loser,” a heartbroken William reinvents himself and rescues mysterious heiress Olivia—sparking jealousy in his ex Emily, who soon learns that crossing Olivia comes with dangerous consequences.
